constructors.name: Point2D(point)
constructors.summary: Explicit copy constructor. Copy only X_COORD and Y_COORD from point
constructors.remarks: Explicit copy constructor. Copy only X_COORD and Y_COORD from point

params.name: point
params.doc: 3D Point which will be copied to the 2D point.

constructors.name: Point2D(refPoint, point)
constructors.summary: Constructor. Initialize point from point in local coordinate system. Formula: Result = refPoint + point
constructors.remarks: Constructor. Initialize point from point in local coordinate system. Formula: Result = refPoint + point

constructors.name: Point2D(x, y)
constructors.summary: Constructor. Initialize point from single coordinates in world coordinate system.
constructors.remarks: Constructor. Initialize point from single coordinates in world coordinate system.

methods.name: Set(point)
methods.summary: Set the coordinate.
methods.remarks: Set the coordinate.

methods.name: Set(x, y)
methods.summary: Initialize from x,y coordinates.
methods.remarks: Initialize from x,y coordinates.

methods.name: __add__(point)
methods.summary: Point translation by point. Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by point. Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.

methods.name: __add__(vec)
methods.summary: Move the point by vector
methods.remarks: Move the point by vector

methods.name: __sub__(vec)
methods.summary: Move the point by reversed vector
methods.remarks: Move the point by reversed vector

methods.name: __sub__(point)
methods.summary: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(new) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.

methods.name: GetCoords
methods.summary: Get copy of X,Y coordinates.
methods.remarks: Get copy of X,Y coordinates.

methods.name: GetDistance
methods.summary: Get distance. Formula: Result(double) = |A-B|.
methods.remarks: Get distance. Formula: Result(double) = |A-B|.

methods.name: IsZero
methods.summary: Check the coords [0.0,0.0]. If the coords are zero, the return value is true. If the coords aren't zero, the return value is false.
methods.remarks: Check the coords [0.0,0.0]. If the coords are zero, the return value is true. If the coords aren't zero, the return value is false.

methods.name: Values
methods.summary: Get copy of X,Y coordinates as python list.
methods.remarks: Get copy of X,Y coordinates as python list.

methods.name: __eq__
methods.summary: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method work without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when points are equal, otherwise false.

methods.name: __iadd__
methods.summary: Point translation by point. Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by point. Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) + Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.

methods.name: __idiv__
methods.summary: Divide operator. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when divider is zero.
methods.remarks: Divide operator. This method is checked and throwing Geometry::Exception when divider is zero.

methods.name: __isub__
methods.summary: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.
methods.remarks: Point translation by negative point Formula: Point(this) = Point(this) - Point This is not standard math operation and is implemented only as practical use case for point moving in %Allplan. In this case given operand point represent offset from Zero point. For standard move operation please use Service::Move method with Vector2D operand.

methods.name: __mul__
methods.summary: Matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix
methods.remarks: Matrix transformation. Result = Point * matrix

methods.name: __ne__
methods.summary: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method works without tolerance!
methods.remarks: Comparison of points without tolerance. Be careful, this method works without tolerance!

returns.doc: True when points are not equal, otherwise false.
